title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, create, and run large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama server, exposing sync/async APIs and chat/completion endpoints.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, installable via npm and usable in Node or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLM and ChatModel components for chains, agents, and RAG.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama, featuring chat history, model switching, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs, model management, and streaming chat.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, supporting completions, chat, embeddings, and model operations.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI (terminal UI) for Ollama built with Textual, offering interactive model/chat management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local AI code completion via Ollama models, similar to GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team, allowing local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-driven recipes and examples for using Ollama with RAG, agents, fine-tuning, and edge deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, ingress, and persistent volume options.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducibly building and running Ollama on NixOS with CUDA/rocm acceleration.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Production-ready Docker images and compose stacks for CPU/GPU inference, including Open-WebUI sidecar.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library that wraps Ollama’s REST API with Finch HTTP, offering chat and embeddings for Phoenix apps.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to Ollama’s API, usable in Tokio or Axum services.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into channels via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams query local Ollama models in threads with @ mentions or shortcuts.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that spins up Ollama containers to run prompt-based tests or generate docs.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat/completion endpoints for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.
